note: Claude Code Write and Edit tools run via fs.writeFileSync and bypass bwrap filesystem sandbox. Enforcement is via explicit agent system prompt instructions only — NOT OS-level protection. All fleet agent prompts (auditor, improver, validator, skill-builder) MUST include: 'Before every Write or Edit tool call, check protected-files.json. You MUST NOT write to any path listed in protected[] or any subdirectory listed in protected_directories[].' This file itself is protected — agents cannot modify it.
